prestazioni: Engine: 2.9L twin-turbocharged V6 (690T) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbos with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes by Armytrix.

Fuel System: Full Motec M150 ECU with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a custom fuel rail setup by Radium Engineering. Water-methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual nozzles targeting the intake manifold.

Suspension & Chassis: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 2-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the GTA-M chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts by Whiteline. Full poly bushings kit from SuperPro (part #SPF0115) and a front strut tower brace by Cusco (Type-RS). Rear subframe reinforcement with a custom aluminum brace by Autohahn88.
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by Novitec (GTA-M specific), including front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts with integrated canards. Rear wing is a 3-piece adjustable carbon fiber unit by APR Performance (GTC-300 model) with gurney flaps.

Wheels & Tires: Forged 19x10.5" front and 19x12" rear wheels by BBS (FI-R model) in gold finish, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (275/30/19 front, 325/30/19 rear). Custom center-lock adapters by D93 Racing.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Recaro (SPG XL seats with GTA-M embroidery), custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec 6-point bolt-in), and a Motec C127 dash display with integrated data logging. Shift knob replaced with a titanium unit by 034Motorsport (short-throw adapter included).
